description: cosine LR + weight decay 5e-4 (too aggressive WD)
batch 512 + LR 0.4 (fewer steps and too high LR)
cutout(16) + label smoothing 0.1 + nesterov (too much regularization)

cosine warm restarts T_0=4000 (single decay better)
seed 123 variance check (91.36 was lucky seed)
